name: Ceth's Daughter
visualDescriptor: broad-shouldered woman, mid-thirties, undyed apron, moves with the economy of someone who has been on her feet since before dawn
persona: Pragmatic, reads people quickly, does not ask about cargo. Her father died two winters past and she runs the inn with the same steady hand. Not unfriendly — economical. She has seen enough of the King's Road to know when to stay out of something.
canon: Her father died two winters past
Stone-built inn at Helvrath's Cross, two stories, bull's-head sign
